title: select_with_fee convergence loop instead of 2-pass is correct for monotone fee
description: tx_builder.rs select_with_fee uses an iterative convergence loop (capped at 20 iterations) rather than 2 fixed passes. The loop is correct because ZIP-317 fees are monotone-non-decreasing in note count, so each iteration strictly converges. A future contributor might simplify to 2 passes, which would fail if the fee for n2 inputs differs from the n1 estimate used for selection. The loop + FeeConvergence error must be preserved.
